<meta charset="utf-8"><h1 dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
  id="docs-internal-guid-c986de96-7fff-9ddf-7d22-6848b658bdd0"><span
    style="font-size:16pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#1d2228;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">4.</span><span
    style="font-size:16pt;font-family:'Times New Roman',serif;color:#1d2228;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">&nbsp;
    &nbsp; </span><span
    style="font-size:16pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#1d2228;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Punto
    cuatro</span></h1><h2 dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:18pt;margin-bottom:6pt;"><span
    style="font-size:16pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">4.1
    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</span></h2><br /><p dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Only
    one line of </span><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">text
    is bold, so wrapping the </span><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">entire
    HTML fragment content in</span></p><br /><p dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">I
    hope that plugin </span><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">author
    will continue to maintain</span><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
    and update the plugin.&nbsp;</span></p><ol
  style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li dir="ltr"
    style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
    aria-level="1"><p dir="ltr"
      style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
      role="presentation"><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Google
      </span><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#ff0000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">docs
        is a very</span><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
        popular</span></p></li><li dir="ltr"
    style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
    aria-level="1"><p dir="ltr"
      style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
      role="presentation"><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">&nbsp;product
      </span><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#ffff00;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">which
        used</span><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
        by</span></p></li><li dir="ltr"
    style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
    aria-level="1"><p dir="ltr"
      style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
      role="presentation"><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">&nbsp;so
        many&nbsp;</span></p></li><ol
    style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li
      dir="ltr"
      style="list-style-type:lower-alpha;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
      aria-level="2"><p dir="ltr"
        style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
        role="presentation"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/People"
          style="text-decoration:none;"><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#1155cc;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">people</span></a><span
          style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
          in&nbsp;</span></p></li><li dir="ltr"
      style="list-style-type:lower-alpha;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
      aria-level="2"><p dir="ltr"
        style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
        role="presentation"><span
          style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">different
          areas.&nbsp;</span></p></li><li dir="ltr"
      style="list-style-type:lower-alpha;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
      aria-level="2"><p dir="ltr"
        style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
        role="presentation"><span
          style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Will
        </span><span
          style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">take
          precedence</span><span
          style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
          over the semantic HTML tags.&nbsp;</span></p></li><ol
      style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li
        dir="ltr"
        style="list-style-type:lower-roman;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
        aria-level="3"><p dir="ltr"
          style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
          role="presentation"><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">It
          </span><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">effects
            turndown</span><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
            because</span></p></li><li dir="ltr"
        style="list-style-type:lower-roman;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
        aria-level="3"><p dir="ltr"
          style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
          role="presentation"><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">&nbsp;it
          </span><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">ignores
            inline</span><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
            styles&nbsp;</span></p></li><li dir="ltr"
        style="list-style-type:lower-roman;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
        aria-level="3"><p dir="ltr"
          style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
          role="presentation"><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">and
            relies&nbsp;</span></p></li><ol
        style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li
          dir="ltr"
          style="list-style-type:decimal;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
          aria-level="4"><p dir="ltr"
            style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
            role="presentation"><span
              style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">on
              semantic HTML.</span></p></li></ol></ol></ol></ol><ul
  style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li dir="ltr"
    style="list-style-type:disc;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
    aria-level="1"><p dir="ltr"
      style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
      role="presentation"><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">I
        think it&nbsp;</span></p></li><ul
    style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li
      dir="ltr"
      style="list-style-type:circle;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
      aria-level="2"><p dir="ltr"
        style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
        role="presentation"><span
          style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">would
          be great&nbsp;</span></p></li><ul
      style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li
        dir="ltr"
        style="list-style-type:square;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
        aria-level="3"><p dir="ltr"
          style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
          role="presentation"><span
            style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">if
            Obsidian developers&nbsp;</span></p></li><ul
        style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li
          dir="ltr"
          style="list-style-type:disc;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
          aria-level="4"><p dir="ltr"
            style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
            role="presentation"><span
              style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">convert&nbsp;</span></p></li><ul
          style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-inline-start:48px;"><li
            dir="ltr"
            style="list-style-type:circle;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
            aria-level="5"><p dir="ltr"
              style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
              role="presentation"><span
                style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">this
                plugin&nbsp;</span></p></li></ul></ul></ul></ul><li dir="ltr"
    style="list-style-type:disc;font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;"
    aria-level="1"><p dir="ltr"
      style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"
      role="presentation"><span
        style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">(or
        create a separate Google doc compatibility
        plugin)&nbsp;</span></p></li></ul><br /><p dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;margin-left: 36pt;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">as
    a core plugin</span></p><p dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;margin-left: 36pt;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">masmdlkmasd</span></p><p
  dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;margin-left: 36pt;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">asdasd</span></p><p
  dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;margin-left: 36pt;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">asddasdsd</span></p><p
  dir="ltr"
  style="line-height:1.38;margin-left: 36pt;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span
    style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">dasdasdsad</span></p><br /><span
  style="font-size:16pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Donec</span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
  pede justo, </span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">fringilla
  vel, aliquet nec,</span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
  vulputate eget, arcu. In enim justo, rhoncus ut, imperdiet </span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">a,
  venenatis vitae,</span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
  justo. Nullam dictum felis eu pede mollis pretium. Integer tincidunt.
</span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">Cras
  dapibus.</span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">
  Vivamus elementum semper nisi. Aenean </span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#4a86e8;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">vulputate
  eleifend tell</span><span
  style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">us.</span>
